{{Infobox event
| name = Subspace distortion
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|A [[Subspace distortion]] resolved into a hulking beast of metal and flesh.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c31">''The Captain'', chapter 31</ref>}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|A [[Subspace distortion]] appears as a swirl of color in the dark fabric of space.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c34">''The Engineer'', chapter 34</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|A [[Subspace distortion]] can bloom like a multicolored rose.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c47">''The Engineer'', chapter 47</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon events]]
